questions.question: What is a man-in-the-middle (MITM) attack? Provide an example.
keyPoints: Explanation of how the attack works

questions.question: Compare and contrast active and passive eavesdropping in MITM attacks. Provide examples of each.
keyPoints: Comparison of active and passive eavesdropping

questions.question: What is SSL stripping in a MITM attack? How can it be prevented?
keyPoints: Explanation of how SSL stripping works

questions.question: Discuss the different types of MITM attacks, including Wi-Fi eavesdropping, SSL stripping, and active eavesdropping. Provide examples of each.
What is certificate pinning in MITM attack detection? How does it work?
keyPoints: Explanation of how certificate pinning works
